resources.string:
Users with special accessibility needs can enable this service to allow SD Maid to automate tasks that would otherwise require tedious manual user interaction (e.g. cache deletion).

Example: If you instruct SD Maid to stop multiple apps then SD Maid can use this service to open each apps settings screen, find the 'Force Stop' button and tap it.

SD Maid will always prominently show when using this service and provide an easy way for the user to cancel any interaction immediately.

No actions will be performed without prior user approval. This service can be disabled again at any time without adverse effects.
SD Maid is interacting with your device. It\'s not possible to use the screen at the same time. Wait until the operation is finished or cancel it.
SD Maid is working
Automation error
Accessibility service is not set up. Complete the setup and give consent.
Service isn\'t enabled
Accessibility service is disabled. Turn it on again.
Service isn\'t running
Accessibility service is not running. Try rebooting the device.
Screen unavailable
The operation was aborted because the screen became unavailable (e.g. display off or lockscreen active).
Automation compatibility
SD Maid couldn\'t figure out the screen layout. If this keeps happening, your language or setup might not be fully supported. Check for updates or reach out to me so I can fix it.
Automation timeout
SD Maid did not complete all steps within the time limit. If this keeps happening, I might need to adjust the app for your device. Check for updates or reach out to me so I can fix it.
Automation overlay
SD Maid could not show the automation overlay. Check permissions and try rebooting your device.
Scheduled automation failed
A scheduled task tried to use the accessibility service, but it was unavailable. If you don\'t need this, disable the \"Accessibility service\" option in the scheduler settings.
Settings screen unavailable
This system app has no settings screen. Cache clearing via accessibility service is not possible. Exclude it to speed up cache clearing.
